title: The Finley Dimension Remastered
description: A simple mod that adds a new dimension, monsters, and biomes.
body:
The Finley Dimension
A place of wonder, mystery, and a whole lot of pain.



The Finley Dimesnion was created about 4 years ago by me as a joke to my freind, this project is a continuation of that mod which the files to were lost. This mod has come a long way from that one though introducing many more biomes and fetures that I never thought I would acutlly add.

 

The main fetures of this mod as of now are:

 

A new diemension with 6 new biomes to explore such as the Living forest and the Finley plains
6 New powerful monsters with many more on the way
New building blocks
A new powerful set of armour
Acid
And so much more
 

Updates will come out every once in a while depending on how much time I have to develop it!

 

This mod is currently in very early development, there will be bugs, there will be more fetures that will come out, some textures are not final.

 

Can I use this in my modpack? Sure

 

Current supported versions:

1.20.1 - Forge (DISCONTINUED)

1.21.4 - Neoforge (DISCONTINUED)

1.21.8 - Neoforge

Fabric? - Coming soon (Hopfully)
